title: Senior Financial Analyst - L&T Finance - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - L&T Finance - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, L&T Finance in Visakhapatnam is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About L&T Finance:
L&T Finance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Finance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
